stemHtml: During an en-route flight phase the crew gets an ACAS RA (Resolution Advisory) and simultaneously receives a conflicting instruction from ATC. Which instruction should the crew follow?

options.a: ATC clearance to minimise the potential risk of flying into terrain.
options.b: RA to minimise the potential risk of collision with another aircraft.
options.c: ATC clearance to minimise the potential risk of collision with another aircraft.
options.d: RA to minimise the potential risk of flying into terrain.
